codeReview.summary: Commit c15ba67 implements the horizon engine scope in sd-core/src/engine.rs: it adds create_tension_full and update_horizon engine APIs, extends PreviousDynamics and DynamicsThresholds for urgency tracking, and integrates urgency/drift computation into compute_and_emit_for_tension while preserving no-horizon behavior.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The rust-library-worker skill requires a strict tests-first RED step and a cargo doc manual verification step, but this worker transcript shows implementation edits before adding the new tests and no cargo doc run; handoff still reports followedProcedure=true.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: worker-transcripts.jsonl skeleton for session 1c46ed35-c7dc-415c-bbf8-72df533e058f shows multiple Edit calls on sd-core/src/engine.rs before horizon tests are added, and handoff.verification.commandsRun lists cargo test/clippy/fmt but no cargo doc command.

summary: PASS: horizon-engine implementation matches the requested feature behavior and commit diff evidence; no blocking code defects found in scope. One process-level skill adherence gap was observed (tests-first/doc verification procedure drift).
